uplink.description: endpoint 0 analog report — 4-20 mA loop current 13 mA -> hydrostatic pressure | payload:110A000C00553941500000
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream Decoder() endpoint 0, cluster 0x000C attr 0x0055. Bytes2Float32(0x41500000)=13 mA; DeltaPressure=(13*0.01875-0.075)*100000=16875 Pa; water.pressure = 16875/1000 = 16.875 kPa.

uplink.description: endpoint 1 analog report — same 13 mA loop current -> fluid level (hydrostatic head) | payload:210A000C00553941500000
uplink._note: byte0 0x21 sets bit0 (standard frame) and yields endpoint 1 via ((b0&0xE0)>>5)|((b0&0x06)<<2). Oracle: upstream FluidLevel = DeltaPressure/(9.81*997) = 16875/9762.57 = 1.72536...; rounded to 4 dp = 1.7254 m. Reproduces upstream when both endpoints carry the same loop current.

uplink.description: node power descriptor — disposable battery voltage | payload:110A00500006410503040E6804
uplink._note: cluster 0x0050 attr 0x0006. Flags byte (index 9) = 0x04 -> disposable battery present; 2-byte millivolts 0x0E68 = 3688 mV -> battery = 3.688 V. Matches upstream disposable_battery_voltage.

uplink.description: lorawan configuration — message type (data report) | payload:110A800400000800
uplink._note: cluster 0x8004 attr 0x0000, value byte (index 7) = 0 -> unconfirmed. Carries no measurement; surfaced as the camelCase extra messageType (mirrors upstream message_type).

uplink.description: Huffman batch frame is not supported | payload:100000000000

errors: Huffman batch frames are not supported

uplink._note: byte0 0x10 has bit0 clear -> upstream brUncompress (Huffman) batch path, which this codec does not decode.
Watteco standard reports only arrive on fPort 125.
